name: Plasma
description: Plasma generates eight pattern variants (Classic, Rings, Diamond, Warp, Cells, Noise, Fractal, Lattice) from the JSON-editable WGSL compute kernel, replacing the legacy compiled-in primitive. The top-level flow is simple: the Inputs node supplies time and aspect ratio directly to the Plasma Pattern kernel. A clip trigger either cycles through patterns automatically (Clip Trigger Cycle) or holds the manual pattern slider selection, selected via a multiplexer. The chosen pattern feeds the kernel, which applies the selected variant with live complexity and contrast control. The output renders directly to the display with speed scaling applied in-shader (scale is inverted for zoom). This is a flat graph; every stage names what it does and no internal grouping earns additional clarity.

nodes.title: Plasma Pattern
